/usr/bin/c++  -std=c++11 -Wno-tautological-constant-compare -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/unittest_radix_tree.dir/unittest_radix_tree.cpp.o -o ../bin/unittest_radix_tree   -L/workspaces/hexagon_c/hexagon_c/libzmq/unittests/unittest_ypipe  -L/workspaces/hexagon_c/hexagon_c/libzmq/unittests/PRIVATE  -L/workspaces/hexagon_c/hexagon_c/libzmq/../lib  -L/workspaces/hexagon_c/hexagon_c/libzmq/unittests/unittest_poller  -L/workspaces/hexagon_c/hexagon_c/libzmq/unittests/unittest_mtrie  -L/workspaces/hexagon_c/hexagon_c/libzmq/unittests/unittest_ip_resolver  -L/workspaces/hexagon_c/hexagon_c/libzmq/unittests/unittest_udp_address  -L/opt/gcc-8.5/lib/gcc/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/8.5.0  -L/opt/gcc-8.5/lib64  -L/opt/gcc-8.5/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/workspaces/hexagon_c/hexagon_c/libzmq/unittests/unittest_ypipe:/workspaces/hexagon_c/hexagon_c/libzmq/unittests/PRIVATE:/workspaces/hexagon_c/hexagon_c/libzmq/../lib:/workspaces/hexagon_c/hexagon_c/libzmq/unittests/unittest_poller:/workspaces/hexagon_c/hexagon_c/libzmq/unittests/unittest_mtrie:/workspaces/hexagon_c/hexagon_c/libzmq/unittests/unittest_ip_resolver:/workspaces/hexagon_c/hexagon_c/libzmq/unittests/unittest_udp_address ../lib/libtestutil-static.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a ../lib/libzmq.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgnutls.so -lbsd -lrt ../lib/libunity.a
